name: Collagen Peptides
summary: Decision-ready summary: Collagen Peptides is best framed for skin elasticity; joint comfort; connective tissue support; safety screen: allergy to source material.
description: Collagen peptides may support skin and connective tissue maintenance by providing absorbable collagen fragments that influence remodeling; evidence is moderate.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.7: Collagen peptides have human RCT evidence for skin elasticity/wrinkles and joint/muscle-support contexts, but effects are modest and source/product quality matters.
claimMap.notes: v9.7: Collagen peptides have human RCT evidence for skin elasticity/wrinkles and joint/muscle-support contexts, but effects are modest and source/product quality matters.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 2.5–10 g/day hydrolyzed collagen peptides; 15 g/day used with resistance training in some muscle studies

sources.title: PubMed PMID 23949208. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
sources.citation: PubMed PMID 23949208. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
